subject: Cannot login to my account
description: I've been trying to login for 2 hours but keep getting invalid credentials error. I'm sure my password is correct. Need urgent help with password reset.

subject: Application crashes on startup
description: The app crashes every time I try to open it on my phone. Getting error 500. This is blocking my work.

subject: Invoice for March payment
description: I did not receive my invoice for the March payment. Can you please send it to my email?

subject: Feature request: Dark mode
description: Would be nice to have a dark mode option in the app. This would really improve user experience at night.

subject: Bug in calculation module
description: Steps to reproduce: 1. Enter values 100 and 50 2. Click calculate. Expected: 150. Actual: 149.99. The calculation is incorrect.

subject: 2FA not working
description: Cannot complete two-factor authentication. The code from my phone is not being accepted. Critical issue!

subject: Slow page loading
description: Pages are loading very slowly today. Homepage takes over 10 seconds to load. Performance issue.

subject: Refund request
description: I was charged twice for my subscription. Please refund the duplicate charge to my credit card.

subject: Add Excel export feature
description: It would be great if I could export my data to Excel format. CSV is good but Excel would be better.

subject: Error when submitting form
description: When I try to submit the contact form I get an error message. The button just doesn't work.

subject: Password reset link expired
description: The password reset link I received expired before I could use it. Need a new one urgently.

subject: App freezes when uploading
description: The application freezes whenever I try to upload a file larger than 5MB. Very frustrating.

subject: Question about pricing
description: I have some questions about your enterprise pricing plan. Can someone from sales contact me?

subject: Mobile app improvement
description: The mobile app could use better navigation. It's hard to find certain features.

subject: Data not saving
description: When I enter data and click save nothing happens. The data is not being saved to the system.

subject: Security concern
description: I noticed some unusual activity on my account. Want to make sure my account is secure.

subject: Server timeout errors
description: Getting frequent timeout errors when accessing the dashboard. This happens daily.

subject: Missing transaction
description: I made a payment yesterday but it doesn't show in my transaction history. Where is it?

subject: Add multi-language support
description: It would be great if the app supported multiple languages. Many of our users are non-English speakers.

subject: Broken link on help page

subject: Cannot change email

subject: Notification spam
description: I'm getting too many email notifications. Need to adjust notification settings.

subject: Billing cycle question

subject: Suggestion for dashboard
description: The dashboard could show more metrics. Would like to see monthly comparisons.

subject: Search not returning results
description: The search function is not working. When I search for items nothing is returned.

subject: Locked out after failed attempts
description: Account locked after 3 failed login attempts. Cannot access at all now.

subject: Memory leak in desktop app
description: The desktop application uses more and more memory over time and eventually crashes.

subject: Incorrect tax calculation

subject: Add API documentation
description: It would be helpful to have comprehensive API documentation for developers.

subject: Button overlap on mobile
description: On mobile devices the buttons overlap making it impossible to click submit.

subject: SSO integration issue
description: Single Sign-On is not working. Getting error when trying to login with company credentials.

subject: Random disconnects

subject: Double charge on renewal

subject: Keyboard shortcuts feature
description: Would love to have keyboard shortcuts for common actions to improve productivity.

subject: Date picker broken

subject: Profile photo upload

subject: Page not responsive

subject: Subscription cancellation

subject: Batch operations feature

subject: Validation error message

subject: CPU usage is high
description: The application uses 100% CPU even when idle. Makes computer very slow.

subject: Payment method update

description: Would like webhook support for real-time notifications to our system.

subject: Infinite loading spinner

subject: Recovery code request

subject: Promo code not working

subject: Form validation bug
description: Form allows submission even when required fields are empty.
